message:
feat(tui): add adapters, input handling, runtime, and widgets modules

- src/tui/adapters.rs: data adapters bridging core models to TUI views
- src/tui/input.rs: keyboard/mouse input event routing
- src/tui/runtime.rs: TUI event loop and terminal lifecycle management
- src/tui/mod.rs, src/tui/render.rs: updates for new submodule wiring

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
